scripts.build: npm run build -w @the-architect/shared-types && npm run build -w @the-architect/core && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @the-architect/shared-types && npm run build -w @the-architect/core && tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @the-architect/shared-types && npm run build -w @the-architect/core && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
